mapper.sql: id, user_id, title, resume_name, resume_type, target_subsidiary_id, target_category_id, basic_info_json, education_json, experience_json, project_json, skills_json, template_code, pdf_url, complete_score, is_default, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM resume WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM resume WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM resume WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, update_time DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resume ( user_id, title, resume_name, resume_type, target_subsidiary_id, target_category_id, basic_info_json, education_json, experience_json, project_json, skills_json, template_code, pdf_url, complete_score, is_default, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{title}, #{resumeName}, #{resumeType}, #{targetSubsidiaryId}, #{targetCategoryId}, CAST(#{basicInfoJson} AS JSON), CAST(#{educationJson} AS JSON), CAST(#{experienceJson} AS JSON), CAST(#{projectJson} AS JSON), CAST(#{skillsJson} AS JSON), #{templateCode}, #{pdfUrl}, #{completeScore}, #{isDefault}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE resume SET title = #{title}, resume_name = #{resumeName}, resume_type = #{resumeType}, target_subsidiary_id = #{targetSubsidiaryId}, target_category_id = #{targetCategoryId}, basic_info_json = CAST(#{basicInfoJson} AS JSON), education_json = CAST(#{educationJson} AS JSON), experience_json = CAST(#{experienceJson} AS JSON), project_json = CAST(#{projectJson} AS JSON), skills_json = CAST(#{skillsJson} AS JSON), template_code = #{templateCode}, complete_score = #{completeScore}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM resume WHERE user_id = #{userId}
